title: Large Rivers in Large Biomes
description: Makes rivers large in Large Biomes. (Alpha)
body:
This data pack changes rivers in large biomes to be larger, around 80 blocks wide.  
Right now, while using the data pack, **you cannot use the default world type due to Minecraft data pack limitations.**

**This data pack is in alpha. If you find bugs, please report them on my [Discord server.](https://discord.gg/PsKFRkmft8)**
